holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: YUNG is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 13.34%, Welltower at 5.04%, Medtronic at 4.37%, Marriott International at 4.15%, and Booking Holdings at 4.13%.

overview.description: The Corgi Longevity Consumer ETF (YUNG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund invests across longevity-oriented consumer categories. The actively managed ETF targets companies from around the world believed to be positioned to benefit from aging demographics and the spending preferences of older consumers. YUNG was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
